description: Accounts in Arabic script and Greek/Coptic numerals. Dated: Rabīʿ I 8[.]2 AH, perhaps 822, which would be 1419 CE. Many of the sums are in the 1000s of whichever currency is being used (both "silver" and "gold" are mentioned).
description_he: רשימה או טבלה בArabic, Greek/Coptic Numerals. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
